title: presentation_map.json — optional visuals mapping
description: OPTIONAL per plant. Maps unit_ids to custom scenes and placements. DEFAULT-BOX RULE (contract; implementation lands with presentation work, WP2.5+): any unit with no entry here is rendered as an auto-generated primitive sized from its simulation geometry (surface_area_m2, spill_level_m, bottom_elevation_m). A plant defined purely by simulation fields is therefore renderable in 3D by construction; custom models are progressive enhancement. Visual adapters remain read-only over snapshots (INV-3) — nothing in this file affects simulation results.

$schema.description: Editor hint; ignored by the engine.

units.description: Per-unit visual overrides; any unit absent here gets the default box.

scene.description: Godot scene rendered for this unit. Omit to get the default box.

rotation_deg.description: Euler rotation [degrees] around X, Y, Z.

mesh_path.description: Custom visual mesh or scene path for the unit.

mesh_scale_m.description: Scale of the custom unit mesh.

mesh_path.description: Custom visual pipe mesh or scene path for the link.

mesh_scale_m.description: Scale of the custom link mesh.

reference_plane.description: Optional background/scaled site blueprint image plane rendered under the plant.

image_path.description: Path to the blueprint image texture inside the project.

center_m.description: Center location [x, z] in meters on the ground plane.
